940 ANTBTC_TKNG_CD ANTBTC_TKNG_CD N0415F1 High-Risk Drug (Is Taking): Antibiotic CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking antibiotic medication during the last seven days or since admission/entry or reentry if less than seven days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
941 ANTBTC_INDCTN_CD ANTBTC_INDCTN_CD N0415F2 High-Risk Drug (Indication): Antibiotic CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking antibiotic medication
